{{CargoRelic
|name=Investment Tips
|class_id=20556
|rank=Green
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=Generations of star investors from the Hamster Clan record their insights and experiences in a notebook, passing it down on and on. On one hand it helps younger generations to learn and grow, on the other hand it can be used for showing off!
|fame=19
|art=14
|fth=13
|civ=29
|tech=15
|ss1=prop@55055_2<br>prop@55060_2
|ss2=prop@55055_2<br>prop@55060_2
|ss3=prop@55055_2<br>prop@55060_2
|ss4=prop@55055_2<br>prop@55060_2
|ss7=prop@55055_2<br>prop@55060_2<br> (Awakened)
}}
